description: A new customer wants to switch from another carrier and keep their existing phone number.

nodes.task_description: Collect the necessary information for the port-in request (old account number, PIN, phone number).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly gathers all required details from the customer.

nodes.task_description: Submit the port-in request to the national number portability database.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully submits the porting request using the system tool.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the port-in request and inform the customer of the expected completion time.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent queries the system and informs the customer the port will complete in 1-2 hours.
